headline: A cleaner start for Shelf and Canvas
summary: Shelf now starts with an empty widget layout, while Canvas helps you find your first wallpaper when its library is empty.

features.title: Start Shelf your way
features.description: Fresh Shelf setups begin with no widgets selected. Widgets you choose afterward remain saved across launches.

features.title: Find your first wallpaper
features.description: An empty Canvas library now links to MotionBGs and MoeWalls alongside the local file picker.

features.title: Clearer empty states
features.description: Canvas now distinguishes an empty library from a search or filter with no matches.
